title: biophytum sensitivum var. cumingianum
intro: Biophytum sensitivum var. cumingianum, also known as the "lakshmi vilasam" or " lakshmi vilasam plant", is a type of tropical plant that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, Biophytum sensitivum var. cumingianum is prepared as an herbal remedy by making a decoction of the roots and leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
